name: AUTOWAVE Co., Ltd.
summary: AUTOWAVE Co., Ltd. sells car supplies through its stores in Japan. The company offers tires and wheels, oils, car audio and navigation products. It also provides car maintenance services, such as vehicle inspection, tire and wheel, oil, sheet metal and repair, body coat, car navigation and audio monitor, battery maintenance, dress up and security product work, and car care club services, as well as purchases and sells cars and offers outdoor season items. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan.
